title: Discover and map all API endpoints
description: Enumerate all API endpoints through OpenAPI/Swagger specs, JavaScript parsing, brute force, and documentation review.
acceptance_criteria: Complete endpoint inventory created (method, path, parameters)
OpenAPI/Swagger specification obtained or generated
Undocumented endpoints discovered through active brute force
API versioning and deprecated endpoints identified

title: Authentication mechanism testing
description: Test all API authentication schemes: JWT, OAuth2, API keys, Basic Auth for vulnerabilities.
acceptance_criteria: JWT signature validation tested (none algorithm, weak secret)
Token expiry and revocation verified
API key entropy and rotation policy assessed
OAuth2 flows tested for authorization code injection and CSRF

title: Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA/IDOR) testing
description: Test every endpoint with object identifiers for BOLA — accessing or modifying other users' resources.
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints with object IDs tested for BOLA
Horizontal privilege escalation confirmed or ruled out
UUID/GUID vs sequential ID exposure assessed
Mass assignment vulnerabilities tested

title: Broken Function Level Authorization (BFLA) testing
description: Test for vertical privilege escalation — low-privilege users accessing admin or privileged functions.
acceptance_criteria: Admin endpoints tested with user-level tokens
HTTP method manipulation tested (GET→POST, etc.)
Role-based access control enforcement verified
Function-level authorization bypass scenarios explored

title: Input validation and injection testing
description: Test all API parameters for injection, schema validation bypass, and excessive data exposure.
acceptance_criteria: All parameters fuzzed for injection vulnerabilities
GraphQL introspection and injection tested if applicable
Excessive data exposure tested (sensitive fields in responses)
Mass assignment tested on all write endpoints

title: Rate limiting and business logic abuse
description: Test API rate limiting, quota enforcement, and business logic for abuse scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Rate limiting tested and bypass attempts documented
Expensive endpoints tested for DoS potential
Business logic abuse scenarios identified and tested
Resource consumption limits verified

title: Generate API security report
description: Export all confirmed API security findings with OWASP API Top 10 categorization.
acceptance_criteria: All findings mapped to OWASP API Security Top 10
Remediation recommendations provided per finding
Report exported in requested format
